nasb.text: alternating a bell and a pomegranate all around on the hem of the robe for the service, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: a bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate around the hem of the robe for ministering, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 一個金鈴，一個石榴，一個金鈴，一個石榴，在外袍周圍的底邊上，在供職時穿用；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 一个石榴一个金铃铛，相间排列，围在外袍的底边。这件外袍是祭司供职时穿的，正如耶和华对摩西的吩咐。
